name: akeyless-connector
description: Securely access databases and cloud services through Akeyless without exposing credentials to Claude.
long_description:
Connect Claude Desktop to [Akeyless Agentic Runtime Authority (ARA)](https://docs.akeyless.io/docs/agentic-runtime-authority) using the official [Akeyless Node.js SDK](https://www.npmjs.com/package/akeyless) — no CLI installation required.

**Tools:** list-secrets · query-db · service-execute · list-sub-tools

The connector reports its version and the bundled SDK version on startup and in MCP server metadata.

### Authentication

Set **Authentication Method**, then fill in only the fields that apply:

| Method | Fields to fill |
|---|---|
| `access_key` | Access ID + Access Key |
| `saml` / `oidc` | Access ID (browser login on first use) |
| `universal_identity` | UID Token File |
| `jwt` | Access ID + JWT |
| `aws_iam` / `azure_ad` / `gcp` | Access ID |

tools.name: list-secrets
tools.description: List ARA-enabled dynamic, rotated, and custom-MCP secrets available to the authenticated role

tools.name: query-db
tools.description: Execute a database query using server-side credentials via the Akeyless Gateway

tools.name: service-execute
tools.description: Execute cloud, Kubernetes, GitHub, or custom MCP actions using server-side credentials via the Akeyless Gateway

tools.name: list-sub-tools
tools.description: List the sub-tools exposed by a service secret before calling service-execute (optional discovery helper)

gateway_url.title: Gateway URL
gateway_url.description: Your Akeyless Gateway address (e.g. https://gw.example.com:8000/api/v2). Auth and list-secrets use the /api/v2 path; ARA execution uses the config port automatically.

access_type.title: Authentication Method
access_type.description: One of: access_key (default), saml, oidc, universal_identity, jwt, aws_iam, azure_ad, gcp. Only fill in the credential fields below that match your choice.

access_id.title: Access ID
access_id.description: Required for access_key, saml, oidc, jwt, and cloud IAM (aws_iam / azure_ad / gcp).

access_key.title: Access Key
access_key.description: Required when Authentication Method is access_key. This is your Access Key secret (same credential type the CLI profile uses).

uid_token_file.title: UID Token File
uid_token_file.description: Required when Authentication Method is universal_identity.

jwt.title: JWT
jwt.description: Required when Authentication Method is jwt (along with Access ID).

agent_id.title: Agent ID
agent_id.description: Identifier for ARA session auditing in the Akeyless Console.

default_secret_name.title: Default secret path (optional)
default_secret_name.description: Default Akeyless path for query-db, same as CLI --secret-name.
